success_surface: Text pattern extraction from cell values using constrained lookup list with case-insensitive matching
effective_behaviors: Performed exploratory data inspection before implementing final solution
Extracted reference/validation data from a separate column before processing
Used regex word-boundary matching for case-insensitive text search
Handled None/null cell values gracefully without errors
Deduplicated reference data when building lookup lists
Saved output to new file path instead of modifying source in-place
Logged intermediate results for debugging and verification
Respected the specified cell range for modifications only
evidence: Agent first ran exploration code to inspect sheet structure, print all content, and check Column D color list before writing solution
Solution extracted valid colors from Column D (rows 3+), storing them in a deduplicated list: ['Red', 'Gold', 'Blue', 'Black']
Used regex pattern r'\b' + re.escape(color.lower()) + r'\b' with IGNORECASE flag for precise word matching
Function returned empty string for None/non-string product names and non-matching entries
Checked if color_val not in valid_colors before appending to avoid duplicates
Output saved to /mnt/data/outputs/.../1_40892_output.xlsx rather than overwriting init.xlsx
Print statements logged each row's input->output transformation and total rows processed
Loop iterated range(2, 18) matching answer_position B2:B17 requirement

memory_items.title: Pre-Implementation Exploration
memory_items.lesson: Always inspect the complete spreadsheet structure before coding solutions
memory_items.generalization: When encountering a new spreadsheet task, first enumerate sheet names, print representative content, verify row/column counts, and identify where reference data is stored. This prevents assumptions about data layout.

memory_items.title: Reference Data Extraction Pattern
memory_items.lesson: Extract lookup/validation criteria from designated columns before processing main data
memory_items.generalization: When a task references a constraint list in a specific column, iterate that column first to build an in-memory lookup table. Deduplicate entries and skip header rows based on context clues.

memory_items.title: Case-Insensitive Word Boundary Matching
memory_items.lesson: Use regex with word boundaries and IGNORECASE flag for substring searches in text cells
memory_items.generalization: For tasks involving keyword or pattern extraction from text cells, use re.compile() with \b word boundaries to match complete words only, not partial matches within larger words. Apply IGNORECASE flag unless case sensitivity is required.

memory_items.title: Null Value Graceful Degradation
memory_items.lesson: Handle None/null cell values by returning default values without raising exceptions
memory_items.generalization: Always check isinstance() for expected types before processing cell values. When no match is found or data is missing, return an appropriate default (empty string, null, 0) rather than throwing errors.

memory_items.title: File Safety Through New Output Path
memory_items.lesson: Save all modified workbooks to new paths, never overwrite original files
memory_items.generalization: Always construct output paths distinct from input paths. Verify write permissions to the output directory before saving. Maintain source file integrity for reproducibility.

edits.content:
## 6. Text Pattern Extraction & Lookup
- **Exploration First**: Before writing solution code, explore the complete spreadsheet structure—list sheets, print sample content, verify dimensions, and locate all relevant data sources.
- **Reference List Handling**: When a task specifies constraints from a lookup column (e.g., "only values from Column D"), extract that list first into memory. Skip header rows and deduplicate entries.
- **Substring Matching**: For keyword extraction from text cells, use regex with word boundaries (`\b`) and IGNORECASE flag to match complete words without false positives. Escape special characters in lookup terms.
- **Missing Data Policy**: Check cell values for None/null types before processing. Return empty string or appropriate default when no match is found; do not raise exceptions.
- **Range Compliance**: Only modify cells within the specified answer position. Use programmatic row iteration (not hardcoded ranges) based on actual data dimensions.
